description: Style NoteIf you want to look fasionable and stylish at this time of the year, sepia has just what you need. This dressy, girly and summery top is a must-have in your wardrobe. Pair this with fitting jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, femine vibe.Product DetailsWhite half sleeve square neck top with a print and embroidered details at the yoke with green at the sleeves and bottomMaterial and Care100% cottonRinse seperatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery or printDry on reverse side under the sunIron at low temperatureSize and FitThe model (height 5'8'' chest 33'') is wearing a size M
